The initial batch contains 250 brochures with 5 applications each, totaling 1,250 highlighted applications. Printing three times the original amount adds 750 more brochures, which brings the total brochure count to 1,000. With 5 applications per brochure, the grand total of highlighted potential applications is 5,000. This number demonstrates the vast scope of research potential being shared at the science fair.
